author: Asha
title: Fast delivery
content: Delivery was quick and the packaging felt premium. Setup was easy too.

author: Rohan
title: Battery issue
content: Battery dies after two hours and support keeps repeating the same script.

author: Neha
title: Great value
content: For the price this speaker sounds amazing and arrived on time.

author: Karan
title: Damage on arrival
content: The box was crushed and the left earbud was already cracked when it arrived.

author: Sana
title: Refund is slow
content: Return pickup happened but the refund still has not been processed after nine days.

author: Aman
title: Good after replacement
content: Replacement unit works fine now but the first one had serious quality problems.

author: Meera
title: Too expensive
content: Sound is decent but the price feels high compared to other options.

author: Dev
title: App setup is confusing
content: The setup app kept disconnecting and the instructions were not clear.

author: Isha
title: Support fixed it
content: Support finally solved the pairing issue in one call and followed up properly.

author: Vikram
title: Delivery delay
content: Shipping slipped twice and nobody updated the ETA until I complained.

author: Priya
title: Packaging is nice
content: Loved the packaging and unboxing experience. Product quality also feels solid.

author: Ritu
title: Defect again
content: Second unit also has a faulty charging case. Quality control seems weak.
